header_intro: Everything you need to know about booking, sessions, and what to expect when working together.

faqs.question: What should we wear for our session?
faqs.answer: Coordinating colors work much better than matching outfits! I recommend neutral tones, earthy colors, and avoiding large logos or distracting patterns.

faqs.question: What happens if it rains on our session date?
faqs.answer: New Hampshire weather can be unpredictable! If the weather doesn't cooperate, we will keep an eye on the forecast and make a call to reschedule to an alternative date at no extra cost.

faqs.question: When will we receive our digital photo gallery?
faqs.answer: Your fully edited online proofing gallery will be delivered via email within 2-3 weeks of your session date.
